calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-05-2012 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-05-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc. is present. Represented by Sam Meki.
Attorney Paul Hogarth appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant E. Leon Waki is present.
Attorney Olivia Jenq representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Wallace Douglass litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 624, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of JAN-09-2012 is vacated.
